title: Agents ignore do-not-hand-edit rule on generated files
mitigation: sync-memory-index.sh --check CI gate + code-style/security-check skill enforcement

title: CI gate fails if jq not installed on runner
mitigation: Install jq step added to ci.yml before sync check

title: Enrichment script may extract wrong module assignments from archived plans
LenientJsonOutputConverter may miss edge cases handled by LlmResponseSanitizer.extractJson()
mitigation: Delegate to extractJson() logic, not just fence-stripping; add parity tests

title: validateSchema() retry loop increases LLM cost on malformed output
ToolSearchToolCallingAdvisor with vector index requires VectorStore bean
mitigation: Fall back to regex index if vector store is unavailable

title: AugmentedToolCallbackProvider adds tokens per tool call (inner thinking)
mitigation: Monitor via LlmUsageTelemetryService; thinking field is a small record

title: Moving SessionMemoryAdvisor inside tool loop may increase session storage
mitigation: Compaction trigger/strategy already configured; monitor session sizes

title: Module-inferred traceability refs may mis-link IT classes to requirements
mitigation: Class-level javadoc added to 96 IT classes; backfill script re-scans source on each run
